text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when I hear voices
from inside a classroom.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm, can we take a break? I think my head's
starting to overheat from all these explanations!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: We just had a break. Please, pay attention!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You look cuter when you smile, Flash. ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you would focus and listen to what I'm saying,
I'd be smiling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... But this stuff about triangles and linear
equations is all Greek to me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I could focus if it was Umadol stuff like dancing
and singing...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All right. Then let's pretend this is about
Umadols.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The tests are your concerts, and the lessons are
your rehearsals. So if you don't learn these
formulas, what does that make you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm... An Umadol who doesn't memorize the
lyrics?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: W-wait! But then... that means I've been...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! Where's my Umadol pride?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols always stay on top of their duties and
shine with all their might!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well said! Then I take it you know what needs to
be done?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've gotta rehearse! I'll head down to the
studio and practice my dance routine right away!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...My best efforts, all for nothing. Who can make
her figure this out?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me. If you have time, would you mind
giving her a word of advice?
choice_data_list: Don't cut corners when it comes to your studies!
Always work toward achieving your dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, do I really have to study?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't get so down. Studying is just like dance
lessons—you learn as you go!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you never cut corners with anything,
right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, I guess not. I always take everything very
seriously as an Umadol! But...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: See, the word "everything" refers quite literally to every thing, which of course includes—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay, I get it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon practically cries out the words, but
eventually starts to study seriously.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I want to shine, body and soul! Which
means... time for dance practice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no, that's not the conclusion you were
supposed to...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh. We were supposed to study for 39 more minutes. My schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon successfully escapes studying and
throws her whole soul into her dance lessons.
